# Outline

## Chapter 1 — Ashes at the Zecca
- story_time: 1521-12-04
- events: [E-001]
- beats:
  - Tommaso arrives before dawn. The city still smells of burnt paper.
  - He reads the scorched ledger scrap — an outbound shipment of silver
    that should not have existed.
  - Master Giraldo evades, shows his bandaged hand. Tommaso does not press.
  - A copyist, Benedetta, appears at the edge of the piazza. Does not
    speak. Watches.

## Chapter 2 — The apothecary
- story_time: 1521-12-06
- events: []
- beats:
  - Tommaso crosses to Ponte San Giovanni against his better judgement.
  - Lucia is treating a burn she will not attribute. She recognizes the
    symptoms of saltpeter exposure.
  - They do not name the fire directly. She lets him leave with a bottle
    of mithridate he did not ask for.

## Chapter 3 — The widening
- story_time: 1521-12-09
- events: []
- beats:
  - Tommaso reports to the Ten with less than they want.
  - He receives, unsigned, a note naming a warehouse near the Arsenale.
  - Ends with his choice to pursue it privately, past his three-week mandate.
